title: ops: define crate publishing order and release procedure
description: The workspace uses path dependencies. Before any backend crate can be published to crates.io with a real version dep on secretx-core, secretx-core must be published first. Define and document the publish order: secretx-core first, then secretx-cache, then all backend crates (in any order, can be parallel), then secretx umbrella. Also document: how workspace.version is bumped in lockstep; how to do a dry-run (cargo publish --dry-run for each crate in order); what to do if a mid-sequence publish fails. Write this up in a RELEASING.md or as a CI job. Note: secretx 0.1.0 was already published with the old single-crate structure — the 0.2.0 publish will be the first real workspace release.
